body.title: Wire embed_text into LearningPipeline._store_knowledge_node()
body.result: write_memory() called after palace INSERT — supplemental best-effort embed into clan.memories; failure logged but never blocks palace write
body.intention: I intend that knowledge nodes produced by the learning pipeline are retrievable via semantic search.
body.description:
Expert audit (ML Engineer): knowledge nodes written to adc.palace have no vector embeddings — semantic search (uurecall source 5) cannot surface them. ScrapsDevice embed_text MCP tool exists but is unused by the pipeline. Wire: after storing the knowledge node, call embed_text on the node's content and store the embedding in adc.palace (or a sidecar table). This closes the loop between learning pipeline and semantic recall.

**Affected files:** devices/librarian/learning_pipeline.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; embed via ScrapsDevice MCP or direct Scraps tool call
**Scope boundary:** IN — embed knowledge node content at write time; OUT — changing adc.palace schema, uurecall changes
**Completion criteria:** uurecall semantic search returns at least one librarian.knowledge.* result for a query_class that has been processed
